any long-term formal and supervised training or education. Further, 
he has not taken up a part-time or full-time job as he was able to 
in the US. Finally, other than Respondent Nos. 4 to 6, we have not 
been informed of any other family or formal/informal support systems 
here that he interacts with regularly or can depend upon. Regardless, 
the doctors at NIMHANS, Bengaluru noted that he was struggling 
to understand the language spoken in Chennai. 
38. In comparison, he has completed most of his schooling in the US; he 
has access to long-term specialized welfare services and curriculums;
